series_metadata.series_description: Provides information about tests which isolate various viruses (such as rabies) from various specimens. Included is patient name, age, race, sex, patient address, private physician name and address, the type of species, the test results, and date of test

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office area for one year, then transfer to State Records Center for storage. Maintain at the State Records Center for one year, then destroy., Paper: Shred
